ground_truth.title: Rent-A-Center at 4464 Market St, Marianna, FL
ground_truth.main_content: Rent-A-Center at 4464 Market St offers rent-to-own furniture, appliances, computers, and electronics in Marianna, FL. Visit your local store to discover affordable solutions for bringing home the things you want. The store carries appliances from major trusted brands like Whirlpool, televisions, cutting-edge computers from brands like HP and Acer, and home decor and furniture from major brands like Ashley Furniture. Rent-A-Center offers flexible payment plans with weekly, bi-weekly, semi-monthly, or monthly payment options. No credit history or minimum FICO credit score is required to rent. Delivery, set-up, and service are included at no extra cost. The store also offers a mobile app for managing accounts and making payments. Store hours are Mon-Wed 10:00 am to 6:00 pm, Thu 10:00 am to 7:00 pm, Fri 10:00 am to 6:00 pm, Sat 9:00 am to 5:00 pm, Sun Closed. Phone: (850) 526-3117. The store may adjust prices to match competitors' advertised prices on new agreements. Available brands include Amana, Ashley Furniture, Asus, DeWalt, Maytag, Nintendo, Porter Cable, Samsung, Sony, Whirlpool, HP, and LG.
with: Rent-A-Center at 4464 Market St offers rent-to-own furniture, appliances, computers, and electronics in Marianna, FL.
No credit history is required and we do not require a minimum FICO credit score.
Delivery, set-up, and service are all included, so you don't have to worry about extra or hidden charges.
Visit your local store to discover the variety of rent-to-own computers, electronics, furniture, and appliances.
Rent-A-Center does not report your payment history to the credit bureaus.
